subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Thee, O my God, for having strengthened Thy handmaidens to turn towards the light of Thy countenance and to advance toward the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لک الحمد یا الهی بما ایدت امائک علی التوجه الی انوار وجهک و الاقبال الی افق
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @role and station of women, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @justice and wrath of God
